title: Lesson 95: (Grammar) - right?; don't you think; hey; come on; listen

intro_cards.title: Sentence Ender ね: Seeking Agreement
intro_cards.body:
ね invites the listener to agree, or softens a statement.

• いい天気ですね。(Nice weather, isn't it?)
• 難しいですね。(It's hard, isn't it.)
• そうですね。(Yes, indeed / that's right.)

ね also softens requests:
• ちょっと待ってね。(Wait a moment, okay?)

Tone difference:
• ね rising ↑ = genuine question seeking confirmation
• ね falling ↓ = sharing a feeling, not really asking

よね = strong assertion seeking agreement: 'It is, right?'
